---
title: "Events"
---

Click on an event to learn more/RSVP

**Check back soon for 2026 CNC events!!**

| Time    | April 24 | April 25 | April 26 | April 27 |
|---------|----------|----------|----------|----------|
| 8 am    |          |          |          |          |
| 9:30 am |          |          |          |          |
| 10 am   |          |          |          |          |
| 11 am   |          |          |          |          |
| 12 pm   |          |          |          |          |
| 1 pm    |          |          |          |          |
| 2 pm    |          |          |          |          |
| 3 pm    |          |          |          |          |
| 4 pm    |          |          |          |          |
| 5 pm    |          |          |          |          |
| 6 pm    |          |          |          |          |
| 7 pm    |          |          |          |          |
| 8 pm    |          |          |          |          |
